description: A track with detailed audio features including embedding vector, energy, key, mood, and tempo.

itemId.description: The unique identifier of the track.

embeddingVector.description: The audio embedding vector for similarity calculations.

energy.description: The energy level of the track.

key.description: The musical key of the track (e.g., C#, D, F).

tempo.description: The tempo of the track in BPM.

moodVector.description: A comma-separated string of mood tags with their confidence scores.

otherFeatures.description: A comma-separated string of additional audio features with their scores.
